sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الْأُمُّ إِلَى السُّوقِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je otišla na pijacu ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The mother went to the market in the morning.

sentences.translation: Kupila je svježu ribu od prodavca.
sentences.translationEn: She bought fresh fish from the vendor.

sentences.translation: Skuhala je ribu s začinima i uljem.
sentences.translationEn: She cooked the fish with spices and oil.

sentences.translation: Obrok je bio lagan i koristan.
sentences.translationEn: The meal was light and nutritious.
